rulings.Case Title: TATIANA DINS VS. CARDENAS THREE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 27, 2020, line 1. DEFENDANT PATRIOT CAPITAL ADVISORS, LLC DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in good faith giving rise to the corporate entity's liability arising out of event occurring prior to its formation or facts giving rise to liability occurring after the formation. The Court notes that a courtesy copy of the operative complaint provided to the Court consisted of 87 pages of unbound loose papers. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN DORGAN VS. EDWARD CHUTE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 27, 2020, line CROSS DEFENDANT KEVIN DORGAN MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to November 6, 2020. Defendant to provide a courtesy copy of October 9, 2020 filing by no later than October 27, 2020 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)
